news.paragraph: Datadog is seeing increased investor interest following a significant price target upgrade from CICC, which raised its outlook from $150 to $204. While broader sector strength is being supported by robust AI demand in cloud and software, traders should remain mindful of potential volatility in the software space.
headlines: Datadog, Inc. (DDOG) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
CICC Adjusts Price Target on Datadog to $204 From $150
